Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-04 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers dominating the rankings. AGI ranks #1 with a score of 92.4, driven by extraordinary 10-year returns of 1,138% and consistent outperformance against SPY across all timeframes (884.4% vs SPY over 10 years). FTI follows with similarly impressive momentum, showing 5-year returns of 771% and a 6.19x acceleration ratio from 1-year to 5-year returns, though its 10-year relative performance has reversed into negative territory (-19.93% vs SPY). Both tickers pass all momentum ratio thresholds and trade above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200), indicating sustained uptrends. The key divergence is AGI's gold-like correlations (0.74 with IAU) suggesting commodity/inflation exposure, while FTI's 10-year underperformance hints at sector-specific cyclicality rather than secular strength. AGI's "overextended" momentum flag signals the move may be stretched in the near term despite long-term dominance.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
